steps: Go to https://dashboard.sinch.com/signup and create an account, or log in at https://dashboard.sinch.com
Navigate to Settings > Access Keys in the left sidebar
Enter a display name for the key and click 'Confirm'
Copy the Key ID and Key Secret immediately — the secret is shown only once
Also note your Project ID from the top of the dashboard
The Authorization header value is 'Bearer {base64(keyId:keySecret)}' — use Key ID as username and Key Secret as password in Basic auth encoding

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key (Key ID:Key Secret)
credential_fields.description: Your Sinch Access Key encoded as base64(keyId:keySecret). Alternatively provide as 'keyId:keySecret' and the gateway will encode it.

notes: Free trial available with test credits on signup
Key Secret is shown only once at creation time — save it immediately
You also need your Project ID for SMS API calls (found in dashboard header)
The SMS API base URL is regional: us.sms.api.sinch.com, eu.sms.api.sinch.com, etc.
Key ID and Project ID are always visible in the dashboard; only the secret is hidden

test_endpoint.description: List SMS batches — requires a service plan ID from your Sinch account
